subject: Political Science
overall_learning_objectives: Critically analyse the concept and objectives of federalism
Evaluate the key constitutional features of federal systems
Compare different types of federations across countries
Examine the constitutional distribution of powers in India
Analyse the political significance of linguistic states
Evaluate the evolution of Centre–State relations in India
Assess the effectiveness of decentralisation and local governance

lesson_plan.title: Conceptual Foundations of Federalism
topics_covered: Federalism as a form of power sharing
student_activities: Compare federal and unitary governments using examples
Write short analytical responses on advantages of federalism

lesson_plan.title: Constitutional Features of Federal Systems
topics_covered: Role of the constitution and judiciary
student_activities: Prepare a concept map of federal system features
Analyse how courts resolve disputes between governments

lesson_plan.title: Comparative Study of Federations
student_activities: Create a comparison chart of two federation types
Discuss how historical context shapes federal structures

lesson_plan.title: Distribution of Powers in India
student_activities: Classify subjects under different constitutional lists
Analyse why certain subjects belong to specific lists

lesson_plan.title: Linguistic States and Language Policy
teaching_strategy: Discussion on political debates related to language
student_activities: Analyse the impact of linguistic reorganisation
Write a short argument supporting or opposing language policy

lesson_plan.title: Centre–State Relations and Political Dynamics
student_activities: Discuss real examples of Centre–State cooperation or conflict
Prepare short notes on coalition politics

lesson_plan.title: Decentralisation and Local Governance
student_activities: Create a diagram of the three-tier governance system
Evaluate advantages and limitations of decentralisation

teacher_tip: Encourage students to connect federalism concepts with contemporary political developments and constitutional debates to deepen their analytical understanding.
